task_name: add Mistral Instruct v3 chat template

details.reasoning: Critical issues found: (1) Format is COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_PEG_NATIVE instead of the required COMMON_CHAT_FORMAT_CONTENT_ONLY - this is a direct rubric violation. (2) The handler delegates turn wrapping [INST]/[/INST] and </s> appending to the template via common_chat_template_direct_apply_impl rather than implementing them explicitly, contrary to rubric requirements that the handler should wrap and append. (3) No explicit handling of system message prepending. Positive aspects: detection logic correctly identifies Mistral Instruct v0.3 by checking for [INST], [/INST] presence and [SYSTEM_PROMPT] absence; LOG_DBG call is present; function signature and dispatch are correct; no existing code was modified.
